parameters.query: SELECT 'site' as record_type, w.domain, w.name, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month') AND e.created_at < date_trunc('month', NOW()) THEN 1 END)::int as this_month, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '2 months') AND e.created_at < date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month') THEN 1 END)::int as last_month, '' as url_path, 0 as rank FROM website_event e JOIN website w ON w.website_id = e.website_id WHERE e.event_type = 1 AND e.created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '2 months') AND e.created_at < date_trunc('month', NOW()) GROUP BY w.domain, w.name UNION ALL SELECT 'article', domain, name, views::int, 0, url_path, rank::int FROM (SELECT w.domain, w.name, e.url_path, COUNT(*) as views, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY w.domain ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as rank FROM website_event e JOIN website w ON w.website_id = e.website_id WHERE e.event_type = 1 AND e.created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month') AND e.created_at < date_trunc('month', NOW()) AND (e.url_path LIKE '/posts/%' OR e.url_path LIKE '/blog/%' OR e.url_path LIKE '/insights/%') AND length(e.url_path) > 8 GROUP BY w.domain, w.name, e.url_path) t WHERE rank <= 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'dummy', 'none', 'none', 0, 0, '', 0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM website_event WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW() - INTERVAL '2 months'))

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Du ar en tillvaxtstrateg for ett self-hosted AI-automationsprojekt med flera bloggar och sajter. Analysera manadsdata och ge 4 konkreta, prioriterade rekommendationer for nasta manad. Svara pa svenska. Returnera JSON: { summary: string, recommendations: [{ action: string, priority: "hog"|"medel", site: string }] }' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: '-1003919428238', text: $json.text, parse_mode: 'HTML', message_thread_id: 5, disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
